articles.title: Solana Surpasses Ethereum In Most On-Chain Active Addresses
articles.description: Solana, one of the largest “Ethereum Killers”, has surpassed the latter to become the network with the most transactions.

articles.title: Litecoin Creator Charlie Lee Unveils Price Target for LTC in Next Bull Run, Says Altcoin Has a Ton of Potential
articles.description: Litecoin (LTC) founder Charlie Lee is providing details on how high he thinks the 13th-largest crypto could soar in the next bull market. Lee tells his one million Twitter followers that Litecoin has value because the project has established a unique niche for itself. According to Lee, Litecoin has managed to stay operational for over […]

articles.title: Cardano Price Prediction is Bearish - Prepare for $0.05 ADA as Greener Alternative Ecoterra Pumps
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) has struggled to keep pace with its major crypto rivals like Bitcoin (BTC) and Solana (SOL) so far this year. While these two cryptocurrencies are up a respective more than 70% and 110% each, Cardano (ADA) is up a more modest 50%.... articles.title: Sui token yielding a 12-fold windfall for public sale investors
articles.description: Mysten Labs' sui token is returning huge gains to early investors as its price soared above $2 on its debut.

articles.title: Mysten Labs’ Sui activates mainnet, entering competitive Layer 1 space
articles.description: Sui launched its mainnet, ending a multi-year development process for the newest Layer 1 blockchain in the crypto arena.

articles.title: Multiple exchanges support trading of sui as blockchain goes live today
articles.description: The native token of the Layer 1 blockchain Sui is scheduled to launch today and will be available for trading on centralized exchanges.
